recommendations.title: The Last Breath
recommendations.overview: A group of old college friends reunite on a Caribbean scuba diving trip exploring the wreckage of a WWII battleship and find themselves trapped inside the underwater labyrinth of rusted metal surrounded by great white sharks.

recommendations.title: F
recommendations.overview: A group of teachers must defend themselves from a gang of murderous kids when their school comes under siege after hours.

recommendations.title: Storage 24
recommendations.overview: Something nasty is lurking inside a secure storage unit. When a group of people get trapped inside, they need to find a way to get out of a building that's designed to keep things in...

recommendations.title: 47 Meters Down
recommendations.overview: Two sisters on Mexican vacation are trapped in a shark observation cage at the bottom of the ocean, with oxygen running low and great whites circling nearby, they have less than an hour of air left to figure out how to get to the surface.

recommendations.title: Primate
recommendations.overview: Lucy, a college student, along with her friends, spend their vacation at her family's home in Hawaii, which includes her pet chimpanzee, Ben. However, when Ben contracts rabies after being bitten by a rabid animal, the group must fight for their live

recommendations.title: V/H/S/99
recommendations.overview: A thirsty teenager's home video leads to a series of horrifying revelations, harkening back to the final punk rock analog days of VHS, while taking one giant leap forward into the hellish new millennium.
recommendations.director: Vanessa Winter, Joseph Winter, Tyler MacIntyre, Flying Lotus, Maggie Levin, Johannes Roberts

recommendations.title: The Other Side of the Door
recommendations.overview: Grieving over the loss of her son, a mother struggles with her feelings for her daughter and her husband. She seeks out a ritual that allows her say goodbye to her dead child, opening the veil between the world of the dead and the living. Her daughte

recommendations.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
recommendations.overview: Once the booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, Raccoon City is now a dying Midwestern town. The company’s exodus left the city a wasteland…with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, the townspeople ar

recommendations.title: The Strangers: Prey at Night
recommendations.overview: A family's road trip takes a dangerous turn when they arrive at a secluded mobile home park to stay with some relatives and find it mysteriously deserted. Under the cover of darkness, three masked killers pay them a visit to test the family's every l

recommendations.title: Catacombs
recommendations.overview: A young woman in Paris goes to a party in the enormous labyrinth of limestone tunnels beneath Paris. When she becomes separated from her friends, she is convinced something is chasing her through the dark tunnels.
